summary_one_line: The 4-byte colorspace signature at offset 0x10 must equal the FOURCC 'MCHC' to take the cmsSigMCHCData switch case.

hypotheses.what_input_feature: A 4-byte profile-colorspace signature field at input offset 0x10-0x13 holding the exact FOURCC 'MCHC' (4d 43 48 43), which equals cmsSigMCHCData and selects the switch case at cmspcs.c:860.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: Both winner-resolving seeds carry 'MCHC' (4d 43 48 43) at offsets 0x10-0x13, the exact FOURCC the switch case cmsSigMCHCData compares against, so _cmsLCMScolorSpace takes the true branch at line 860.
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: All loser-blocking seeds carry 'RGB ' (52 47 42 20) at offsets 0x10-0x13, which matches case cmsSigRgbData (line 815) instead, so the switch never reaches the cmsSigMCHCData case and the true side stays blocked.
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: value_profile adds CMP_MAP gradient feedback: each integer/string CMP against the colorspace signature writes a matching-prefix / Hamming-distance bucket, so an input whose signature bytes get progressively closer to 'MCHC' is preserved as corpus and the fuzzer climbs the gradient to the exact 4-byte match. naive has only edge-counter feedback and no signal that distinguishes a near-match signature from any other wrong value, so it must hit the exact FOURCC by blind havoc.

evidence_trail.claim: The blocked true side is the switch case cmsSigMCHCData in _cmsLCMScolorSpace at cmspcs.c:860.
Both winner-resolving seeds contain the FOURCC 'MCHC' at offsets 0x10-0x13.
Loser-blocking seeds contain 'RGB ' at offsets 0x10-0x13 instead of the MCHC signature.
The byte diff shows W=MCHC vs L=RGB at the four offsets 0x10-0x13 as DIFFER (concentrated, informative dataflow signal).
In the loser run the RgbData case true side fires (T=47) while the MCHC blocker true side never fires (T=0), confirming the loser is diverted to the RGB case.
value_profile is the winner and naive is the loser at this decisive pair with prob_div=1.00.
value_profile's mechanism is CMP_MAP gradient feedback keyed by operand-distance bucket (Hamming distance / matching-prefix length), which preserves inputs whose CMP operands move closer to matching.
evidence_trail.exact_quote:
An input that produces a
CMP-operand pair closer to matching than any previously-seen pair
adds a new CMP_MAP bucket and is preserved as corpus.

evidence_trail.claim: value_profile has no I2S substitution mutator, so the winning advantage is the CMP_MAP gradient and not input-to-state replacement.

mechanism_consistency_check.verification_method: claimed_mechanism is CMP_MAP gradient (value_profile vs naive), not I2SRandReplace, so the mandatory lineage I2S-floor check does not apply. The value_profile MECHANISM CONTEXT confirms CMP-operand-distance bucket feedback and explicitly states 'No `I2SRandReplace`', so no dash-row lineage verification is warranted; the program-side FOURCC match is evidenced directly by the byte diff.

falsifiability.would_be_refuted_by: A synthetic harness gating a switch on an exact 4-byte FOURCC where value_profile and naive resolve the case at statistically indistinguishable rates would refute the CMP_MAP-gradient advantage.

weakest_evidence_point: Only two winner seeds are available, so the inference that the CMP_MAP gradient (rather than lucky havoc on a narrow 4-byte field) drives the 10/10 vs 0/10 split rests on the mechanism description rather than per-seed gradient evidence.
